scripts.lint:all: pnpm --filter './backoffice' lint && pnpm --filter './client' lint && pnpm --filter './delivery-portal' lint && pnpm --filter './tenant-dashboard' lint && pnpm --filter './api' lint
scripts.docker:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.infra.yml up -d --build && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build
scripts.docker:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down && docker compose -f docker-compose.infra.yml down
